package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_deserialize: Gin handlers that materialize c.Request.Body with io.ReadAll(...) and then bind the same body again.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule332NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule332NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule332NegativeRecord) (Rule332NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario332Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule332NegativeService, input Rule332NegativeRecord) (Rule332NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule332NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
